ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the clothing size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the size */,
  "short_length" TEXT /* Inseam length for short size */,
  "regular_length" TEXT /* Inseam length for regular size */,
  "tall_length" TEXT /* Inseam length for tall size */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the size */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement range for the size */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's measurement profile */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_measurement_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_profile_id") REFERENCES measurement_profiles ("measurement_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_profiles" (
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the profile */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Customer's inseam measurement */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Customer's shoulder width */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Customer's chest measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Customer's hip measurement */,
  "height" TEXT /* Customer's height */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Customer's neck measurement */,
  "bicep" TEXT /* Customer's bicep measurement */,
  "calf" TEXT /* Customer's calf measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the measurement profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item is expected to be restocked */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the inventory is stored */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the purchase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the purchase was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
